---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for CodeTube
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## 💡 Feature Description

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## 🎯 Problem Statement

Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.
Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

## ✅ Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like to see implemented.

## 🔄 Alternative Solutions

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## 📸 Mockups / Examples

If applicable, add mockups, screenshots, or examples from other products to help explain your feature request.

## 🎯 Use Cases

Describe the specific use cases where this feature would be valuable:

1. As a [creator/viewer/admin], I want to [...] so that [...]
2. [...]

## 🌍 Impact

Who would benefit from this feature?
- [ ] Content Creators
- [ ] Tutorial Viewers
- [ ] Platform Administrators
- [ ] All users

## 📋 Additional Context

Add any other context, references, or links about the feature request here.

## 🙋 Willing to Contribute?

Would you be willing to implement this feature yourself?
- [ ] Yes, I'd love to work on this!
- [ ] I could help with testing/documentation
- [ ] No, but I can provide more details if needed
